description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with office and party wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 2" Upper Grooved fabric footbed with a synthetic leather patch on the mid length, ergonomically curved and padded for absolute comfort and style Thong styled straps with a synthetic leather inner lining and grooved fabric upper, and has a toe separator to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a designed heel unit and horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Remove dust from fabric using a soft bristled brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
